===
structures_if
===
a=
	if a
	b else if c
	d
	else d
---

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (if_expr
        guard: (variable_expr
          (identifier))
        (then
          then: (variable_expr
            (identifier)))
        (else_if
          guard: (variable_expr
            (identifier))
          (then
            then: (variable_expr
              (identifier))))
        (else
          (variable_expr
            (identifier)))))))

===
structures_for
===
a={
	var $sum = 0
	for num in num_list {
		$sum = $sum + num
	}
	for num in num_list
		thing!(num)
}

---

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (body_expression
        (var_declaration
          name: (identifier)
          body: (expr_body
            (const
              (int))))
        (for_expr
          pattern: (identifier_pattern
            (identifier))
          iterable: (variable_expr
            (identifier))
          body: (body_expression
            (value_declaration
              (decl_left
                (identifier_pattern
                  (identifier)))
              body: (expr_body
                (bin_op_expr
                  part: (variable_expr
                    (identifier))
                  part: (operator)
                  part: (variable_expr
                    (identifier)))))))
        (for_expr
          pattern: (identifier_pattern
            (identifier))
          iterable: (variable_expr
            (identifier))
          body: (function_call_pnc_expr
            caller: (variable_expr
              (identifier))
            args: (variable_expr
              (identifier))))))))

===
structures_todo
===
implement_me_later = |_str| ...
---

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (anon_fun_expr
        args: (argument_patterns
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier)))
        body: (expr_body
          (todo_expr))))))

===
structures_early_return
===
early_return = |arg| {
	first =
		if !arg {
			return 99
		} else {
			"continue"
		}
    other
}
---

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (anon_fun_expr
        args: (argument_patterns
          (identifier_pattern
            (identifier)))
        body: (expr_body
          (body_expression
            (value_declaration
              (decl_left
                (identifier_pattern
                  (identifier)))
              body: (expr_body
                (if_expr
                  guard: (prefixed_expression
                    (variable_expr
                      (identifier)))
                  (then
                    then: (body_expression
                      (early_return_expr
                        body: (expr_body
                          (const
                            (int))))))
                  (else
                    (body_expression
                      (const
                        (string)))))))
            (variable_expr
              (identifier))))))))

===
structures_if odd
===
early_return =
  if if a b else c d else e
---

(file
  (value_declaration
    (decl_left
      (identifier_pattern
        (identifier)))
    body: (expr_body
      (if_expr
        guard: (if_expr
          guard: (variable_expr
            (identifier))
          (then
            then: (variable_expr
              (identifier)))
          (else
            (variable_expr
              (identifier))))
        (then
          then: (variable_expr
            (identifier)))
        (else
          (variable_expr
            (identifier)))))))
